name: All Purpose Clear Expandable Bin Large - Brightroom™
description:
Simplify your home storage with this Large All-Purpose Clear Expandable Bin from Brightroom™. Designed in a transparent clear hue, this storage bin lets you easily see the stored contents, while the expandable design provides extra space for storing large items. Featuring cutout handles for easy portability, this 518.4-cubic-inch bin is ideal for storing towels, blankets and other frequently-used items.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
